name: jira-worklogs
title: Jira Worklogs
description: Track time for Jira issues from Raycast.
author: nicolae_ciocan

preferences.name: menubarTextMaxLength
preferences.title: Menubar Text Max Length
preferences.description: Maximum number of characters shown for issue labels in the menubar title and items.

commands.name: select-issue
commands.title: Select Issue
commands.subtitle: Pick a Jira issue and start tracking time
commands.description: Browse your Jira issues and start a timer for the work you are doing

commands.name: worklogs
commands.title: Worklogs
commands.subtitle: Review tracked time day by day
commands.description: View your worklogs for today by default and navigate to other dates when needed

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Jira Worklogs Menubar
commands.subtitle: See the current timer and today's total
commands.description: Show your current tracking status in the menu bar and jump into worklogs or issue selection

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
